def test_quicksort_with_duplicates():
    from source import quicksort
    input_list = [3, 1, 3, 2]
    expected_output = sorted(input_list)
    result = quicksort(input_list)
    assert result == expected_output, f"Quicksort failed to handle duplicates: expected {expected_output} but got {result}"
